raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is fully reachable from the front-right of the robot, with at least 10 cm of lateral clearance for the right claw to close around its mid-section. No other objects obstruct the side approach path.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is firmly held in the right claw and no longer resting on the table, leaving the front of box_2 unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "clear area on the far-right side of the tabletop",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the designated spot on the far-right of the table is free of objects and large enough to safely accommodate the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released upright on the far-right of the table, well away from box_1 and box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The front face of box_2 is now completely exposed and a clear rightward path (toward the cup’s former position) is free of obstacles so the box can slide without colliding with other objects or table edges.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 has been slid approximately 20 cm to the right, creating a gap between its left face and the right face of box_1 large enough for the robot’s right arm to access box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both the left and right faces of box_1 are now accessible with no obstacles within 10 cm. The robot’s arms can approach laterally from opposite sides and synchronize to apply gentle, balanced pressure.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely gripped between the two arms and lifted slightly above the tabletop—fulfilling the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is fully reachable from the front-right of the robot, with at least 10 cm of lateral clearance for the right claw to close around its mid-section. No other objects obstruct the side approach path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is firmly held in the right claw and no longer resting on the table, leaving the front of box_2 unobstructed.

parsed_json.Target: clear area on the far-right side of the tabletop
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the designated spot on the far-right of the table is free of objects and large enough to safely accommodate the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released upright on the far-right of the table, well away from box_1 and box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The front face of box_2 is now completely exposed and a clear rightward path (toward the cup’s former position) is free of obstacles so the box can slide without colliding with other objects or table edges.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 has been slid approximately 20 cm to the right, creating a gap between its left face and the right face of box_1 large enough for the robot’s right arm to access box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both the left and right faces of box_1 are now accessible with no obstacles within 10 cm. The robot’s arms can approach laterally from opposite sides and synchronize to apply gentle, balanced pressure.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely gripped between the two arms and lifted slightly above the tabletop—fulfilling the task of picking up the darker box.
